summary.summary: Patch release v0.8.4 that updates submodule references for G7SensorKit, MedtrumKit, and OmnipodKit and bumps the app version to 0.8.4. (Submodule commit changes shown in the diff and bump commit.) [diff:d6262f18b840, commit:f3478131198b, commit:000943e2e7b4, commit:29350e31a9f8]
summary.userFacingImpact: This change updates only submodule pointers and the app version string in Config.xcconfig; there are no other changes to Trio source files in this patch as shown by the diff and files. (APP_VERSION and APP_DEV_VERSION changed from 0.8.3 to 0.8.4.) [diff:d6262f18b840, file:0d4360c1c90d] The PR description indicates the submodule bumps include an OmnipodKit fix (PR #99 referenced as fixing #1236) and a G7SensorKit update to show sensor lifecycle, which may produce user-visible changes in those integrations; specifics require reviewing the updated submodule commits themselves. [pr:gordolio/Trio#1257, file:b67f12e35208, file:b3713be7767b]
